name: Goguma Chilge Muchim (Sweet Potato Vine & Mus
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Sweet potato vine, cut into three-inch lengths
1/4 lb Mushrooms, fresh/meaty caps only, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the corn oil in a wok or skillet over moderate heat.
2. Add the sweet potato vine and mushrooms; stir-fry for 1 minute.
3. Add the garlic, carrot, salt, and sesame oil. Stir-fry for an additional 8 to 10 minutes until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
4. Serve warm or at room temperature. This recipe serves 4 people.
